CRYPTID-PARANORMAL_POWER.title: Paranormal
CRYPTID-PARANORMAL_POWER.description: At the end of your turn, gain Block equal to your stacks, then lose half of them (rounded down).
CRYPTID-PARANORMAL_POWER.smartDescriptio: At the end of your turn, gain Block equal to your stacks, then lose half of them (rounded down).
CRYPTID-ABDUCTED_POWER.title: Abducted
CRYPTID-ABDUCTED_POWER.description: This enemy has been abducted. Cryptid cards trigger bonus effects.
CRYPTID-MADNESS_POWER.title: Madness
CRYPTID-MADNESS_POWER.description: Deal 25% less damage and gain 25% less Block. Decrements at the end of the player's turn.
CRYPTID-MADNESS_POWER.smartDescription: Deal 25% less damage and gain 25% less Block.
CRYPTID-RADIO_STATIC_POWER.title: Radio Static
CRYPTID-RADIO_STATIC_POWER.description: Whenever you gain Paranormal from a card play, deal {Amount} damage to a random enemy.
CRYPTID-RADIO_STATIC_POWER.smartDescript: Whenever you gain Paranormal from a card play, deal {Amount} damage to a random enemy.
CRYPTID-CONSPIRACY_BOARD_POWER.title: Conspiracy Board
CRYPTID-CONSPIRACY_BOARD_POWER.descripti: Every 3 Skills played in a turn, Channel 1 random Entity. (Upgraded: also gain 1 Paranormal.)
CRYPTID-HIVE_MIND_POWER.title: Hive Mind
CRYPTID-HIVE_MIND_POWER.description: All Paranormal gains are increased by +{Amount}.
CRYPTID-HIVE_MIND_POWER.smartDescription: All Paranormal gains are increased by +{Amount}.
CRYPTID-INTERDIMENSIONAL_TREATY_POWER.de: Whenever you gain Paranormal, also gain that much Block.
CRYPTID-INTERDIMENSIONAL_TREATY_POWER.sm: Whenever you gain Paranormal, gain that much Block.
CRYPTID-MOTHERSHIP_POWER.title: Mothership
CRYPTID-MOTHERSHIP_POWER.description: At end of each turn: Channel 1 Entity (2 if upgraded). If any enemies are Abducted, deal 5 damage to ALL of them.
CRYPTID-MOTHERSHIP_POWER.smartDescriptio: End of turn: Channel Entity, deal 5 to all Abducted enemies.
CRYPTID-OBSERVATION_DRONE_POWER.title: Observation Drone
CRYPTID-OBSERVATION_DRONE_POWER.descript: At the end of your turn, Channel 1 random Entity. (Upgraded: also gain 1 Paranormal.)
CRYPTID-GLITCH_IN_THE_SKY_POWER.title: Glitch in the Sky
CRYPTID-GLITCH_IN_THE_SKY_POWER.descript: Whenever you Evoke an Entity, gain 1 Energy at the start of your next turn. (Upgraded: also draw 1 card.)
CRYPTID-GLITCH_IN_THE_SKY_POWER.smartDes: On Evoke: gain 1 Energy next turn.
CRYPTID-PARANORMAL_REACTOR_POWER.title: Paranormal Reactor
CRYPTID-PARANORMAL_REACTOR_POWER.descrip: At the start of your turn: if you have 6+ Paranormal, spend 3 and gain 1 Energy. (Upgraded: also draw 1 card.)
CRYPTID-PARANORMAL_REACTOR_POWER.smartDe: Start of turn: spend 3 Paranormal (if 6+) → 1 Energy.
CRYPTID-BIGFOOT_POWER.title: Bigfoot
CRYPTID-BIGFOOT_POWER.description: At the end of your turn, deal damage to a random enemy equal to your Paranormal.
CRYPTID-BIGFOOT_POWER.smartDescription: End of turn: deal Paranormal damage to a random enemy.
CRYPTID-MOTHMAN_POWER.title: Mothman
CRYPTID-MOTHMAN_POWER.description: Whenever an enemy gains Madness, deal {Amount} damage to ALL enemies.
CRYPTID-MOTHMAN_POWER.smartDescription: On enemy Madness gain: deal {Amount} to all enemies.
CRYPTID-TEMP_DEXTERITY_POWER.title: Temp Dexterity
CRYPTID-TEMP_DEXTERITY_POWER.description: Gain {Amount} bonus Block this turn. Expires at end of turn.
CRYPTID-TEMP_STRENGTH_POWER.title: Temp Strength
CRYPTID-TEMP_STRENGTH_POWER.description: Deal {Amount} bonus damage this turn. Expires at end of turn.
CRYPTID-BLACK_EYED_CHILDREN_POWER.title: Black-Eyed Children
CRYPTID-BLACK_EYED_CHILDREN_POWER.descri: Whenever you Evoke an Entity, gain {Amount} Paranormal.
CRYPTID-ELDRITCH_TRANSFORMATION_POWER.de: Whenever you apply Madness to an enemy, gain 1 Temp Dexterity (and 1 Temp Strength if upgraded).
CRYPTID-ELDRITCH_TRANSFORMATION_POWER.sm: On Madness apply: gain 1 Temp Dexterity.
CRYPTID-ANCIENT_TABLET_POWER.title: Ancient Tablet
CRYPTID-ANCIENT_TABLET_POWER.description: Your next Evoke triggers twice. Consumed on use.
